author: mark
text:
Document the bare central-hub repo model

Add a 'The bare central hub' README section (alongside the state-branch architecture/glossary): the recommended bare deployment, why bare-ness is a load-bearing git-level invariant rather than a hook-enforced convention, what lives at a bare root, and that 'git status' there is fatal by design (observe via 'bl list' + git status inside the active worktree).

State where bl runs against a bare hub: read-only/root commands work post bl-8cf7, bl review squashes via an internal detached worktree, bl close runs from the bare root. Reconcile every 'run from the repo root' line in README.md and SKILL.md with bare-repo behavior, plus a glossary entry and a compact SKILL section for agents.
